# [EPIC] Provision crossfire spec-review stage

## Objective

Add a non-blocking spec-review stage that emits a ranked assumption ledger before the Forge Factory commits real infrastructure.

## Target

`crossfire_forge/`

## Sub-issues

- [ ] #479 Wire reviewer harness and fake reviewer path
- [ ] #482 Integrate advisory GitHub Action (closes #479, not this Epic)

Factory PRs close sub-issues, not Epics. RBAC scope for the review stage is unspecified.
